default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Galileo and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and next steps for SEO and content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/NpoPDLFFyzKsJzGjcKzyYAEPZDXX3sSg?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content quality improvement is the current focus, with 8-10 articles/week target](https://fathom.video/share/NpoPDLFFyzKsJzGjcKzyYAEPZDXX3sSg?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
  - [Airtable updates streamline content review process and status tracking](https://fathom.video/share/NpoPDLFFyzKsJzGjcKzyYAEPZDXX3sSg?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [SEO performance shows promising growth, especially for AI agent-related queries](https://fathom.video/share/NpoPDLFFyzKsJzGjcKzyYAEPZDXX3sSg?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [Technical SEO review planned for early February to assess recent changes](https://fathom.video/share/NpoPDLFFyzKsJzGjcKzyYAEPZDXX3sSg?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Workflow Updates

  - [Airtable reorganized with new statuses: client review, client review post-edits, creating article, and proposed](https://fathom.video/share/NpoPDLFFyzKsJzGjcKzyYAEPZDXX3sSg?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [New topics for next week to be proposed by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/NpoPDLFFyzKsJzGjcKzyYAEPZDXX3sSg?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
  - [Podcast articles workflow in development, delivery starting from Jan 15th](https://fathom.video/share/NpoPDLFFyzKsJzGjcKzyYAEPZDXX3sSg?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [Focus on maintaining 8-10 articles/week while prioritizing quality improvement](https://fathom.video/share/NpoPDLFFyzKsJzGjcKzyYAEPZDXX3sSg?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
  - [Conor to prioritize review of newly created articles](https://fathom.video/share/NpoPDLFFyzKsJzGjcKzyYAEPZDXX3sSg?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)

### SEO Performance and Metrics

  - [AI agent-related queries driving significant clicks](https://fathom.video/share/NpoPDLFFyzKsJzGjcKzyYAEPZDXX3sSg?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - Impressive impression growth despite \<20 published articles
  - [New Looker template in development for detailed performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/NpoPDLFFyzKsJzGjcKzyYAEPZDXX3sSg?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
  - [CTAs to be updated across different article types, leveraging new ebook (coming next week)](https://fathom.video/share/NpoPDLFFyzKsJzGjcKzyYAEPZDXX3sSg?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)

### Technical Updates and Research

  - [Backend improvements by CTO during break to enhance efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/NpoPDLFFyzKsJzGjcKzyYAEPZDXX3sSg?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
  - [Ongoing research categorization for agents and evaluation topics](https://fathom.video/share/NpoPDLFFyzKsJzGjcKzyYAEPZDXX3sSg?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Competitor analysis added to Airtable, including keyword rankings and difficulties](https://fathom.video/share/NpoPDLFFyzKsJzGjcKzyYAEPZDXX3sSg?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)
  - [Technical SEO review planned for early February to assess recent changes and impact](https://fathom.video/share/NpoPDLFFyzKsJzGjcKzyYAEPZDXX3sSg?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)

### Content Quality and Review Process

  - [Team open to rewriting articles if extensive edits are needed](https://fathom.video/share/NpoPDLFFyzKsJzGjcKzyYAEPZDXX3sSg?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [Quality improvement noticed month-over-month, aiming for minimal review process](https://fathom.video/share/NpoPDLFFyzKsJzGjcKzyYAEPZDXX3sSg?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Balancing act between increasing volume and maintaining/improving quality](https://fathom.video/share/NpoPDLFFyzKsJzGjcKzyYAEPZDXX3sSg?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Deliver scheduled articles by Friday (this week)](https://fathom.video/share/NpoPDLFFyzKsJzGjcKzyYAEPZDXX3sSg?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [Propose new topics for next week by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/NpoPDLFFyzKsJzGjcKzyYAEPZDXX3sSg?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
  - [Complete refinement and clustering of new opportunities in Airtable by tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/NpoPDLFFyzKsJzGjcKzyYAEPZDXX3sSg?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - [Conor to review and assign articles in client review status](https://fathom.video/share/NpoPDLFFyzKsJzGjcKzyYAEPZDXX3sSg?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
  - [Update CTAs across different article types once new ebook is available](https://fathom.video/share/NpoPDLFFyzKsJzGjcKzyYAEPZDXX3sSg?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Schedule technical SEO review for early February](https://fathom.video/share/NpoPDLFFyzKsJzGjcKzyYAEPZDXX3sSg?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)
  - [Continue developing Looker template for performance metrics](https://fathom.video/share/NpoPDLFFyzKsJzGjcKzyYAEPZDXX3sSg?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)

action_items.description: Finalize performance update template in Looker
Deliver new article proposals for next week by Friday
Complete refining and clustering of new opportunities in Airtable by tomorrow
Review newly created articles in Airtable (prioritize over older ones in client review status)
Assign internal reviewers for articles in "client review" status in Airtable
Schedule technical SEO review with Nikka for early February
